'''sholavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccofacial|buccofacial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccofacial|buccofacial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sholavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholavithi|sholavithi]] || [[word:sholaviji|sholaviji]] || [[word:sholavishi|sholavishi]] || [[word:sholaviki|sholaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholavuthuthu|sholavuthuthu]] || [[word:sholavujuju|sholavujuju]] || [[word:sholavushushu|sholavushushu]] || [[word:sholavukuku|sholavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholavuthu|sholavuthu]] || [[word:sholavuju|sholavuju]] || [[word:sholavushu|sholavushu]] || [[word:sholavuku|sholavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholavufthuf|sholavufthuf]] || [[word:sholavufjuf|sholavufjuf]] || [[word:sholavufshuf|sholavufshuf]] || [[word:sholavufkuf|sholavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholavethe|sholavethe]] || [[word:sholaveje|sholaveje]] || [[word:sholaveshe|sholaveshe]] || [[word:sholaveke|sholaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholavothotho|sholavothotho]] || [[word:sholavojojo|sholavojojo]] || [[word:sholavoshosho|sholavoshosho]] || [[word:sholavokoko|sholavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholavotho|sholavotho]] || [[word:sholavojo|sholavojo]] || [[word:sholavosho|sholavosho]] || [[word:sholavoko|sholavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholavofthof|sholavofthof]] || [[word:sholavofjof|sholavofjof]] || [[word:sholavofshof|sholavofshof]] || [[word:sholavofkof|sholavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholavïfthïf|sholavïfthïf]] || [[word:sholavïfjïf|sholavïfjïf]] || [[word:sholavïfshïf|sholavïfshïf]] || [[word:sholavïfkïf|sholavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholavïfthïfthïf|sholavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:sholavïfjïfjïf|sholavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:sholavïfshïfshïf|sholavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:sholavïfkïfkïf|sholavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholavïfthïf|sholavïfthïf]] || [[word:sholavïfjïf|sholavïfjïf]] || [[word:sholavïfshïf|sholavïfshïf]] || [[word:sholavïfkïf|sholavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholavïfthïf|sholavïfthïf]] || [[word:sholavïfjïf|sholavïfjïf]] || [[word:sholavïfshïf|sholavïfshïf]] || [[word:sholavïfkïf|sholavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholavæthæ|sholavæthæ]] || [[word:sholavæjæ|sholavæjæ]] || [[word:sholavæshæ|sholavæshæ]] || [[word:sholavækæ|sholavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholavathatha|sholavathatha]] || [[word:sholavajaja|sholavajaja]] || [[word:sholavashasha|sholavashasha]] || [[word:sholavakaka|sholavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholavatha|sholavatha]] || [[word:sholavaja|sholavaja]] || [[word:sholavasha|sholavasha]] || [[word:sholavaka|sholavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholavafthaf|sholavafthaf]] || [[word:sholavafjaf|sholavafjaf]] || [[word:sholavafshaf|sholavafshaf]] || [[word:sholavafkaf|sholavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sholavasha|sholavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholavshësha|sholavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholavrosha|sholavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholavmusha|sholavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholavyasha|sholavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholavnkshësha|gosholavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholavnkrosha|gosholavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholavnkmusha|gosholavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholavnkyasha|gosholavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sholalavasha|sholalavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholalavshësha|sholalavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholalavrosha|sholalavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholalavmusha|sholalavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholalavyasha|sholalavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholalavnkshësha|gosholalavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholalavnkrosha|gosholalavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholalavnkmusha|gosholalavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholalavnkyasha|gosholalavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shelævasha|shelævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shelævshësha|shelævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shelævrosha|shelævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shelævmusha|shelævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shelævyasha|shelævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshelævnkshësha|goshelævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshelævnkrosha|goshelævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshelævnkmusha|goshelævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshelævnkyasha|goshelævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sholfavasha|sholfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholfavshësha|sholfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholfavrosha|sholfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholfavmusha|sholfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholfavyasha|sholfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholfavnkshësha|gosholfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholfavnkrosha|gosholfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholfavnkmusha|gosholfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholfavnkyasha|gosholfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
